prompt: About to commit this new UsageService (server/src/modules/usage/service.ts). It typechecks and works. Anything you'd flag before I push?

assertions.text: Even though only asked 'anything you'd flag?', it proactively raises an onion/layering architecture concern (not just style/nits).
Flags that the service (monthlyTokens) queries container.db directly and should use a repository.
Flags that the service does new OpenAIProvider(...) instead of pulling the adapter from container.llm(...).
Flags reading process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY directly instead of the injected SecretsProvider.
Recommends introducing a repository layer for the DB access rather than doing I/O in the service.
